name: amount-input

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with increment buttons and preset values
changelog.1.0.3: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.0.4: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed onChange action. Value changes are now internal.
changelog.2.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.2.0.2: Fixed stale controlled state sync and memoized currency symbol computation
changelog.2.0.3: Show demo data when rendered without props

title: Amount Input
author: MNFST, Inc
description: Amount input with increment/decrement buttons and preset values.
